zh.Winnington, Shropshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾文寧頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire於1475年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾文寧頓時，他的父親Richard Winnington I46歲，母親Catherine Grosvenor41歲。他和Catherine Grosvenor至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1525年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Winnington, Shropshire, England, United: 英国英格兰史洛普爾文寧頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire于1475年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾文寧頓时，他的父亲Richard Winnington I46岁，母亲Catherine Grosvenor41岁。他和Catherine Grosvenor至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1525年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Winnington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Winnington (Cheshire, Staffs). (ii)  see  Wennington  .

variants.name: Wennington
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Wennington (Hunts, Essex). (ii)  see  Winnington  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire was born in 1475, in Winnington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Winnington I, was 46 and his mother, Catherine Grosvenor, was 41. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Catherine Grosvenor. He died about 1525, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire est né en 1475, à Winnington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Winnington I, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Catherine Grosvenor, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Catherine Grosvenor. Il est décédé environ 1525, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire 1475 in Winnington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Winnington I 46 und seine Mutter Catherine Grosvenor 41. Er hatte mit Catherine Grosvenor mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1525 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire è nato il nel 1475 nel Winnington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Winnington I, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Grosvenor, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Catherine Grosvenor. Morì circa 1525, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshireが1475年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィニントンで生まれた時，父Richard Winnington Iは46歳，母Catherine Grosvenorは41歳であった。彼はCatherine Grosvenorとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1525年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire(이)가 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 윈잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Winnington I(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Grosvenor(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Catherine Grosvenor(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1525년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire родился в 1475 г. в местности виннингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Winnington I было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Grosvenor, 41. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Catherine Grosvenor. Он умер около 1525 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Winnington of Cheshire nació en 1475, en Winnington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Winnington I, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Catherine Grosvenor, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Catherine Grosvenor. Murió aproximadamente 1525, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
